title: Tony Runs Wild
writer: Henry H. Knibbs, Edfrid A. Bingham, Robert Lord
actors: Tom Mix, Tony the Horse, Jacqueline Logan
plot: Tom Grant saves Grace Percival from being tromped by a herd of stampeding horses,led by Tony, and they become friends. Grace tells Slade, a renegade who has been trying to capture Tony, the leader of the wild horses, that Tom has ...
